records.ety: [From Milaner an inhabitant of Milan, in Italy; hence, a man from Milan who imported women's finery.]

defs: Formerly, a man who imported and dealt in small articles of a miscellaneous kind, especially such as please the fancy of women.
quotes: No milliner can so fit his customers with gloves.

defs: A person who designs, makes, trims, or deals in hats, bonnets, headdresses, etc., for women.
